facebook.caption: POV: you skipped the crowded south end and ended up at Ông Lang instead. Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc sits right on Đường Dinh Bà, away from the tourist strip. 4.7 stars across 3,072 reviews. That's not luck, that's consistency. Quieter beach, full spa, and that slow-morning resort energy most people fly to Phu Quoc to find. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch what Ông Lang actually looks like when the crowds stay south. Ocean Bay Resort & Spa Phu Quoc, 4.7 stars, 3,072 reviews. This is why you book the quieter side of the island.
